event: Evening Scene by a Riverbank with Fire
description: A dark, atmospheric landscape painting showing a group of small silhouetted figures gathered around a fire on the bank of a wide river at twilight. Tall bare trees frame the scene on the right, their dark branches reaching into a yellow-orange sky fading to grey-blue. The fire's glow illuminates the figures in warm tones against the dark ground. The river stretches away into the distance, reflecting the fading light of the sky. The palette is dominated by deep blues, greens, and warm amber highlights.
